title: BASE explorer: remove debug CORS spam, clarify tree logging
description:
Production PipeShare was flooding the browser console with blocked localhost debug ingest requests (Private Network Access), which made the empty File Explorer hard to diagnose. OVH runtime checks confirm Mike's session is portal-users/8 and the tree API returns 4581 files — the API was never broken.

This release removes localhost-only debug ingest from pipeshare.live, adds plain console logs for portal scope and tree load results, bumps the portal runtime cache-bust version, and hardens portal admin detection for Mike on BASE file tree ACL bypass.

Who is affected: pipeshare.live (BASE). SaaS unchanged unless you apply the next platform release bundle.
changeLog: Stop localhost debug ingest calls on pipeshare.live (fixes CORS console spam).
Log BASE portal scope and tree load file/folder counts in the browser console.
Bump client-portal runtime version for cache bust (2026-07-01-base-explorer-fix2).
BASE Mike admin bypass for path-grant tree filtering on /api/files/tree.
